title: Digital Garage Expands FinTech Suite with Integrated Digital Wallet for “Cloud Pay Business”
tags: Digital Garage Launches AI-Powered Advertising Platform “FT MediaString” to Navigate Post-Cookie LandscapeDigital Garage (TSE Prime: 4819), a leading Japanese payment and marketing group, has launched “FT MediaString,” an AI-driven advertising business designed to integrate proprietary FinTech data with premium media inventory. The initiative, spearheaded by subsidiary BI.Garage, enters the market as the digital advertising industry faces mounting challenges in theJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
